name: Study Mix loads an interleaved queue item or a clear empty state
description: The Study Mix page builds an interleaved practice queue. When cards are due it presents the first study item with prompt text, a progress indicator, and a type badge; when nothing is due it shows an all-caught-up empty state rather than a blank panel.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Study Mix link in the sidebar

Verify the page presents EITHER a study item card containing prompt/question text together with a progress indicator (such as 'Item 1 of N') and a type badge labeled Flashcard or Feynman Prompt, OR an explicit 'all caught up / nothing due' empty state — confirming the queue builder produced a real result rather than an empty container
